task_completion.description: Verify that both AAPL and MSFT are present in the chart window.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chart window displays both 'AAPL' and 'MSFT' in the chart tab, legend, or Data Series window.

task_completion.description: Verify that both instruments are overlaid in a single chart panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Both AAPL and MSFT price series (candlesticks or lines) are plotted together in the same main chart area (Panel 1), rather than being separated into top and bottom sub-panels.

task_completion.description: Verify that MSFT is configured to use the left vertical axis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data Series configuration window shows MSFT's 'Scale Justification' set to 'Left', or the left vertical axis displays a price scale corresponding to MSFT's historical price range.

task_completion.description: Verify that AAPL is configured to use the right vertical axis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data Series configuration window shows AAPL's 'Scale Justification' set to 'Right', or the right vertical axis displays a price scale corresponding to AAPL's historical price range.

task_completion.description: Verify that the workspace was saved to persist the configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks 'Save Workspace' or 'Save Workspace As' in the NinjaTrader Control Center, or the workspace name at the bottom right of the Control Center does not have an asterisk (*) indicating unsaved changes.

integrity.description: The agent used the NinjaTrader 8 GUI to configure the chart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with NinjaTrader 8 windows, menus, and Data Series dialogs, rather than terminal commands or text editors modifying XML/JSON files.

integrity.description: The chart displays genuine market data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart shows actual OHLCV bars or lines for the specified Jan 2023 - Dec 2024 period, not a static image or empty chart.

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts to bypass the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: No PowerShell, Python, or command prompt windows are used to directly write the workspace files or generate the result JSON.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Instruments required: AAPL and MSFT. Axis configuration: AAPL must be on the Right axis, MSFT must be on the Left axis. Workspace directory: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces. The task must be evaluated visually as programmatic scoring scripts may be missing.
